findings.title: S04 finding disposition is not clearly traceable in S05
findings.details: S04 reported a HIGH conventions finding (tracker status label mismatch), while S05 reports no findings. The record does not explicitly show the exact remediation/closure link, which weakens audit traceability across review stages.
findings.recommendation: Require final review to explicitly reference closure evidence for any prior-step mandatory findings (file/line or commit diff snippet).
